message:
fix: SQLite store safety — revoke tokens, swap constants, query limits, dead schema (#7755)

- #7731: RevokeToken uses INSERT OR IGNORE instead of INSERT OR REPLACE
  so re-revoking a token cannot silently extend its expiry
- #7732: SnoozeSwap and handler use models.SwapStatusSnoozed constant
  instead of hardcoded "snoozed" string literal
- #7733: GetDashboardCards query bounded by maxDashboardCards (500)
- #7734: ListClusterGroups query bounded by maxClusterGroups (200)
- #7735: Removed dead github_issue_url column from feature_requests
  schema — never written to or read by any SQL query (handler
  populates QueueItem.GitHubIssueURL from the live GitHub API)

Fixes #7731, #7732, #7733, #7734, #7735

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
